about.hero.name: Pakorn
about.hero.bio: With over a decade of engineering experience, I design, build, and deliver robust software solutions for businesses across Thailand — combining technical depth with a commitment to quality.
about.intro.title: Engineering that moves your business forward
about.intro.p1: I'm a Chartered Professional Engineer with more than 10 years of experience across software development and quality assurance. I've designed and built systems from the ground up — owning every phase from architecture and development through to testing and delivery.
about.intro.p2: My work is focused on Thai SMEs and growing businesses that need reliable, well-engineered software they can depend on. I take pride in clear communication, on-time delivery, and solutions that hold up long after launch.
about.cred.thai: Proven software delivery for Thai businesses
about.expertise.title: Areas of expertise
about.expertise.dev.title: Software Development
about.expertise.dev.desc: End-to-end application design and development — from architecture and backend logic to front-end interfaces and deployment.
about.expertise.testing.title: Software Testing & QA
about.expertise.testing.desc: Rigorous quality assurance across unit, integration, and system testing to ensure every release is stable and production-ready.
about.expertise.solutions.title: Business Solutions
about.expertise.solutions.desc: Managed delivery of complete software solutions tailored to the needs of Thai SMEs — on time, on scope, and built to last.
